name: Browser Tabs (per-agent isolation)
description: Scopes the shared browser to the calling agent: each agent may only act on tabs it opened, and omitted-target actions default to the agent's own tab — so concurrent agents stop colliding on one Chrome. Interim action-isolation via before/after tool-call hooks; the complete server-side list-scoping is proposed upstream (openclaw/openclaw).

enabled.description: Master switch. When false the plugin observes/enforces nothing (stock shared-browser behavior).

debug.description: Log each observe/enforce decision (agent, action, target) at info level. For diagnostics only.
